title: brachypodium schumannianum
intro: Brachypodium schumannianum, also known as Schumann's false brome, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachypodium schumannianum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves or roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
